className.description: GatewayClass name. Consumer Gateway resources reference this via gatewayClassName. Ignored when skip is true.

resources.description: Resource requests for the bundled EG install. Defaults: controller 10m/64Mi

controller.description: EG controller container requests. Default cpu 10m

proxy.description: Per-Gateway envoy proxy container requests. Default cpu 10m

autoTeardownHours.description: Hours until the in-cluster reaper Job tears the cluster down. 0 / unset uses the 8-hour default. Pick a higher value for an overnight session (e.g. 24).

cpus.description: vCPU count. qemu sets -smp; docker passes --cpus.

fqdnDomain.description: Parent domain for per-context FQDNs. Per-context FQDN is <context>.<lbGroup>.<fqdnDomain>. Default uses the RFC 6761 reserved test TLD.

gateway.description: Bundled Envoy Gateway install. Skip the install entirely (no CRDs

imageCache.description: Hetzner Object Storage-backed image cache. Leave bucket empty to disable; see HETZNER_PROVISIONER.md phase 6.

k3s.description: k3s install settings. Defaults track pkg/provision/config/k3s.yaml.

lbGroup.description: Per-developer LoadBalancer key. Empty defaults to $USER at provision time. Multiple contexts with the same lbGroup share one LB.

lifetime.description: Cost-control auto-expiry. maxRun sets a wall-clock budget counted from when the cluster STARTS (not from provision); on expiry a local cluster runs onExpiry (stop by default) and a GCP appliance is deleted by GCP-native max-run-duration. Empty maxRun disables.

location.description: Hetzner Cloud location. hel1 (Helsinki) is the default; nbg1/fsn1 are the German alternatives.

memory.description: Memory in MB. qemu allocates this to the VM; docker passes it to --memory.

name.description: Cluster instance identifier; used as the docker container name / qemu -name / kubeconfig cluster name / prefix for cache files.

osImage.description: Hetzner Cloud OS image name. Ubuntu cloud images get k3s installed at first boot via cloud-init.

portForwards.description: Host->guest TCP port forwards. Defaults to 6443/80/443 when omitted. Must include a guest:6443 entry so the host's kubectl can reach the API server.

provider.description: Provisioner to use. Optional in the common schema -- when omitted at provision time the host is probed (multipass daemon reachable -> multipass; Linux+/dev/kvm+qemu-system-x86_64 -> qemu; else reachable docker daemon -> docker). Per-provider schemas narrow this to a single literal and keep it required.

registries.description: k3s registries.yaml content. Written to /etc/rancher/k3s/registries.yaml on the node before k3s starts. ${VAR} substitution is supported on credential and endpoint fields.

serverType.description: Hetzner Cloud server type. cx23 is the default; pick a larger one for resource-heavy workloads.

sshUser.description: Unprivileged user the y-cluster CLI SSHes as. Created by cloud-init at first boot.

storage.description: Bundled local-path-provisioner install. Defaults give a predictable on-disk layout (/data/yolean/<ns>_<pvc>) and Retain reclaim so PV content survives PVC delete and an appliance upgrade rebinds the same directory by name.

bucket.description: Hetzner Object Storage bucket holding the OCI layouts + index.json. Empty disables the image-cache feature.

indexKey.description: Object key within Bucket holding the cache index. Defaults to index.json when bucket is set.

region.description: Hetzner Object Storage region (hel1 / fsn1 / nbg1). Defaults to hel1 when bucket is set.

rejectUpstream.description: Makes k3s refuse to pull from any upstream registry so cache misses become hard errors. Off by default.

install.description: Install strategy. airgap pre-loads images on the node; script downloads via get.k3s.io. qemu only.

maxRun.description: Wall-clock budget as a Go duration such as 8h or 90m. Counted from cluster start. Empty disables auto-expiry.

onExpiry.description: Local action on expiry. Ignored on the GCP appliance path (always deletes the instance).

host.description: Host port. Empty string lets the provider pick (qemu: SLIRP-assigned; docker: docker-assigned).

configs.description: Per-host TLS and auth settings. Keys match the registry hostname (the original host or a mirror endpoint host).

mirrors.description: Per-host mirror redirects. Keys are the original registry hostname requested by containerd.

password.description: Basic auth password; ${VAR} supported. Common pattern: oauth2accesstoken with ${GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN}.

auth.description: Username/password or token credentials for this host.

tls.description: Client TLS settings for this host.

endpoint.description: Mirror endpoints to try in order. ${VAR} substitution supported.

rewrite.description: Regex rewrite rules applied to the request path before forwarding to the mirror.

ca_file.description: Path to CA file on the node.

cert_file.description: Path to client cert file on the node.

insecure_skip_verify.description: Disable TLS verification for this host. Off by default.

key_file.description: Path to client key file on the node.

path.description: Root directory under which local-path-provisioner allocates one subdirectory per PV. Customers who attach a separate data disk should mount it here.

reclaimPolicy.description: Reclaim policy on the y-cluster StorageClass. Retain preserves PV directories on PVC delete; Delete (the upstream k3s default) wipes them.
